From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Look up ***[Ghent](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Ghent "wiktionary:Ghent")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**[Ghent](/wiki/Ghent "Ghent")** (officially written *Gent* in Dutch), is a city in Belgium.

**Ghent** may also refer to:
